title: taraxacum dens-leonis subsp. pyrenaicum
intro: Taraxacum dens-leonis subsp. pyrenaicum is a subspecies of dandelion, a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and other nutrients that offer various health benefits, such as improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and boosting the immune system. Taraxacum dens-leonis subsp. pyrenaicum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and powder, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
